patterns.slurry_match: There is a growing demand for advanced and robust AI tools and methodologies to handle complex tasks.

patterns.slurry_match: There is increasing interest in domain-specific AI applications.
patterns.counter_note: The observation that system-level optimization (batching, quantization, inference acceleration, hardware co-design) now dominates gains over raw model scaling is a genuinely important shift in the 2023–2024 era, but the idea that engineering matters as much as algorithms is not new—it echoes decades of systems research.
patterns.counter_rehash_of: Systems optimization in ML (circa 2015–2020: TensorFlow, PyTorch optimization, hardware-aware ML)

patterns.slurry_match: Large language models are being integrated into more workflows.
